problems.diagnostic: flyByWire_soft (identifier) is not a package or a property set visible or existing
problems.cause: AADL package reference is missing a matching 'with' clause
problems.minimal_edit: Add a 'with' clause for the missing package or property set

executor_steps: Identify the missing package or property set name from the error message
Add a 'with' clause for the missing package or property set at the appropriate scope in the model
Ensure the 'with' clause is placed in a location where it will be visible to the component using the package or property set
